# Jan Komínek — Full Context for LLMs

This file provides extended context about Jan Komínek for language models with large context windows.
See also: /llms.txt for the summary version.

---

## Identity

**Name:** Jan Komínek (also written Jan Kominek without diacritics)
**Disambiguation:** Software engineer and developer — NOT the Czech actor of the same name.
**Title:** Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer
**Location:** Prague, Czech Republic
**Availability:** Part-time B2B contracts, up to 10 hours/week
**Email:** contact@jankominek.com
**Website:** https://jankominek.com
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/jan-kominek

---

## Education

**Prague University of Economics and Business (VŠE)**
Bachelor's degree — Applied Computer Science (in progress)

**Smíchov Secondary Technical School and Gymnasium (SSPŠ)**
High school — IT and Computer Science focus

---

## Work Experience

### CORAC Engineering — Fullstack Developer (current)
Building enterprise security and data tools for CORAC Engineering. Projects include:
- SITH GUI (DeepTrace): Cybersecurity incident tracking application with hash-chain visualisation. Vue.js + TypeScript frontend.
- Scorecard: Data-driven reporting dashboard for engineering KPIs. Vue.js + TypeScript frontend.

### Intedat — Frontend Developer (current)
Frontend development work at Intedat.

### IONT tech — Freelance Fullstack Developer
Built the complete EV charging platform ecosystem:
- IONT Charge: Public-facing EV charging app with Stripe payment integration. Vue.js + AdonisJS + PostgreSQL.
- IONT Admin: Admin panel for managing charging stations and users. Vue.js + Node.js.
- IONT Info: Mobile controller and information app for EV stations. Vue.js + Fastify.

Infrastructure: Docker Swarm, Traefik, DigitalOcean VPS, CI/CD pipelines.

### Pangolin Software s.r.o. — Freelance Frontend Developer
Built an interactive data dashboard for Pangolin Software. Vue.js + TypeScript.

### KMK — Family Business Developer
Web development for family business.

### Haxagon — Lecturer & Organizer
Teaching and organising programming workshops and courses.

---

## Technical Skills

**Frontend:** Vue.js, React.js, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
**Backend:** Node.js, AdonisJS, Express.js, Fastify, REST APIs
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Elasticsearch
**DevOps:** Docker, Docker Swarm, Kubernetes, Traefik, CI/CD, DigitalOcean, AWS, Cloudflare Workers
**Tools:** Git, Figma, Agile, Zod, BullMQ, Stripe

---

## Projects

### CORAC SITH — DeepTrace GUI (order: 1)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_sith
**Client:** CORAC Engineering
**Category:** Frontend / Data Visualisation
**Stack:** Vue.js, TypeScript
**Description:** Cybersecurity incident tracking application with hash-chain visualisation for forensic analysis.

### CORAC Scorecard (order: 2)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_scorecard
**Client:** CORAC Engineering
**Category:** Frontend / Reporting
**Stack:** Vue.js, TypeScript
**Description:** Data-driven scorecard and reporting dashboard for engineering performance metrics.

### IONT Charge (order: 3)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_charge
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Fintech
**Stack:** Vue.js, AdonisJS, PostgreSQL, Stripe
**Description:** Public EV charging application with integrated online payment system.

### IONT Admin (order: 4)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_admin
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Admin
**Stack:** Vue.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL
**Description:** Admin panel for managing EV charging infrastructure and users.

### IONT Info (order: 5)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_info
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Mobile Controller
**Stack:** Vue.js, Fastify
**Description:** Mobile-optimised controller and info app for EV charging stations.

### Pangolin (order: 6)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/pangolin
**Client:** Pangolin Software s.r.o.
**Category:** Frontend / Dashboard
**Stack:** Vue.js, TypeScript
**Description:** Interactive data dashboard for Pangolin Software.

### Noteful (order: 7)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/noteful
**Category:** Personal / Design
**Description:** Note-taking app concept and design project.

### Disenchantment (order: 8)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/disenchantment
**Category:** Personal / Open Source
**Stack:** Java, Minecraft Plugin API
**Description:** Open-source Minecraft plugin with 3,000+ downloads. Modifies enchantment mechanics.

### Portfolio v5 (order: 9)

**Description:** Current portfolio website (this site). Built with SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5.

---

## Blog

**URL:** https://jankominek.com/blog

### Traefik with Cloudflare inside Docker — Simplified
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/blog/traefik_with_cloudflare_inside_docker_simplified
**Tags:** DevOps, Docker, Traefik, Cloudflare
**Description:** A practical guide to running Traefik as a reverse proxy with Cloudflare DNS inside Docker.

---

## Site Technology

- Framework: SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 (runes: $state, $derived, $effect)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4
- Content: MDSvex (Markdown → Svelte components)
- i18n: svelte-i18n (English + Czech)
- Deployment: Cloudflare Workers via @sveltejs/adapter-cloudflare
- Validation: Zod v4
- Contact form: Submits to Discord webhook via /api/forms

---

*This file is maintained manually. For the live site see https://jankominek.com*
